rationale: This skill instructs the agent to install @vercel/sandbox via pnpm and write TypeScript code that creates Vercel Sandbox microVMs, so it will read/write package.json, node_modules, and likely vercel.json for cron config. It needs Vercel API credentials (VERCEL_TOKEN/TEAM/PROJECT) read from env, and reaches api.vercel.com to provision sandboxes plus npm registry for installs. Inside the host process the agent shells out to pnpm/npm/npx/node/tsx (and references sh, sudo, dnf, ldconfig, base64, agent-browser as commands run inside the sandbox VM, which still appear as subprocess invocations from the SDK perspective). Browser automation targets arbitrary URLs (example.com is the documented target).
